titleStmt.title: SII 23.69: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 69. (A.R. No. 69 of 1907.) Tirumalai, Polur Taluk, North Arcot District On a boulder in the tank Dēvarāya II: year Krōdhana

summary.p: This is dated in the reign of the Vijayanagara king Vīrapratāpa Dēvarāya-Mahārāya (II) ‘who witnessed the elephant hunt’, and in the cyclic year Krōdhana (Kārttika 6) corresponding to Śaka 1367 and A.D. 1445. It records a decision by Tipparaiśa-Nāyakkar the agent (of the king), the Tāṉattār and the Māhēśvaras and also the residents of Paḍaivīḍu, setting apart the money received as income from the fishing lease in the tank (ērippāśi ?) from four specified tanks in the tirunāmattukkāṇi of Tirumalai, for (removing the silt and) deepening those tanks every year, and the amount of the vāśalkuḻippaṇam(?) from the paḷḷichchandam to deepen another tank.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . śrīmaṉ makāmaṇṭalecuraṉ kecaveṭṭai ka
ṇṭaruḷiya virapiṟatāpa tevarāya makaārāyar cakāṟttu
kaiyil kāriyattukku kaṭava tipparaica nāyakkarum
tāṉattār māyecurarum kalveṭṭikkuṭutta
śubhamastu 2 kuṟotaṉavaruṣam kāttikaiṭṭa 6-tiyil
paṭaiviṭu Uṭaiyārom ṉā vanayiṉārr tirunāmattukkāṇi
tirumalaiyil peṟakkaṭava poṉ Aṇikalattuāl Ental
kal Ental nantipparaiyaṉ Ental cilatoṅkaṉ Inta Erikaḷil
Erippāciyil vilaiyil paṇam Uḷḷatu varuṣa varuṣatoṟum
Inta Erikaḷile kuḻiveṭṭakkaṭavatu Ākavum vācal kuḻippaṇam
Uḷḷatu paḷḷiccantam vācal kuḻippaṇam Uya Eriyile kuḻiveṭṭak
kaṭavatu Ākavum Inta taṉmattukku Akutam paṇṇiṉa
varkaḷ kaṅkaikaraiyil kārāmpacuvaik koṉṟa
pāvattile pokakkaṭavarkaḷākavum Ivai tipparaica nāyakkar Eḻuttu
Ivai cūriyapaṭṭar Āḻvār Eḻuttu Ivai vaṇi
ḻumalai nāyaṉ Eḻuttu poṉ
ṉampala rācāḻvi Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 23.69 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
